subcodes.first_line: O faithful friend! The detailed letter was received and its contents brought solace to the heart. Thou didst cherish the wish that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست با وفا نامه مفصل رسید و مضامین سبب تسلی خاطر گردید آرزوی آن داشتی که
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @importance of community building, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
